title: anthemis orientalis
intro: Anthemis orientalis, also known as Oriental Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its flowers and leaves, which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anthemis orientalis include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing anxiety and stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
